caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" and a matching green baseball cap sits in a room filled with framed photos and apparel. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and racks of clothing are visible. Small logos appear in the lower corners of the scene, including one that reads "BONE" and another that says "BONE FAMILY TOT." As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expressions and head position; he begins by looking forward with his eyes partially closed, then glances to his right with a slight smile, and finally looks back toward the center while continuing to speak. The background setting remains static throughout the clip.
